overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City during a golden hour sunset. The character travels from under a concrete overpass, through an urban intersection, and along a palm-lined street with a large floating airship visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: approaching the end of the overpass where bright sunset light becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket crossing the sidewalk from right to left

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a tunnel-like effect overhead
thick steel support columns with rivets holding up the overpass
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
classic 1970s style sedan parked along the curb
overhead electrical wires running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive concrete highway overpass in an urban environment. The space is dimly lit with artificial lights mixed with ambient glow from the exit ahead. Graffiti covers the left wall while cars occasionally pass on the right. The camera moves steadily forward toward the bright light at the end of the underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street with sunset view toward city center

events.description: exits the covered overpass into open air with full sky visibility
dramatic shift from shadow to intense golden hour backlighting as the sun appears directly ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the setting sun along the sidewalk with long shadows cast behind

entered.detail: bright orange sun low on the horizon creating lens flare and long shadows
distant futuristic skyscrapers silhouetted against the sunset
large illuminated advertising screen displaying animated content
tall palm trees lining the distant street
metal scaffolding on a building under construction

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass, the scene opens into a wide urban street bathed in golden hour light. The sun sits low on the horizon directly ahead, silhouetting the distant city skyline. A large digital billboard glows on the right while construction scaffolding lines the left. The character continues walking forward as the environment transitions from enclosed to expansive.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection with other pedestrians
turning right at the corner to follow the new sidewalk direction

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning right onto a new sidewalk while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing white hat standing at the corner waiting to cross

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
suspended traffic signals above the intersection
low-rise commercial building at the street corner

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a busy intersection and crosses the street alongside other pedestrians. After crossing, they turn right onto a new sidewalk. The digital billboard that was distant is now closer on the right. The area is more populated with people waiting at corners and walking in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined urban sidewalk with mixed residential and commercial buildings

events.description: large floating airship becomes visible in the sky above the city

agents.ego_description: walking along the palm-lined sidewalk toward the sunset with the airship visible overhead

entered.detail: massive hovering aircraft with illuminated windows floating above the city
row of tall palm trees casting long shadows across the sidewalk
weathered wooden railing along the right side of the walkway
single-story commercial building with large windows

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sidewalk lined with palm trees, the character moves toward the setting sun. A massive floating airship hovers in the sky to the left, adding to the futuristic atmosphere. The street is quieter here with fewer pedestrians, featuring a mix of residential structures and small storefronts. Long shadows stretch across the pavement as the sun dips lower on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim, enclosed shadows of an urban underpass into a wide, sun-drenched futuristic cityscape. It begins beneath a massive concrete highway overpass where graffiti-covered walls and artificial lights frame a steady forward path toward a bright exit. As the character emerges from the tunnel, the scene opens into an expansive street bathed in golden hour light, with the low sun silhouetting a distant skyline and illuminating digital billboards. The camera then follows the character across a busy pedestrian intersection before turning right onto a sidewalk where the environment shifts toward a more residential feel. Finally, the path leads along a row of palm trees and small storefronts, moving toward the setting sun as a massive floating airship hovers in the sky and long shadows stretch across the pavement.
